cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. Jane quit her job on March 20, 2020. Now, 176 days have passed since then. I need to figure out what the date is tomorrow in MM/DD/YYYY format, and choose from the given options. So, the first thing is that if 176 days have passed since March 20, 2020, then the current date today should be 176 days after March 20, 2020. Then, tomorrow's date would be 177 days after March 20, 2020. Let me start by calculating the date that is 176 days after March 20, 2020, and then add one more day to get tomorrow's date. But maybe I can do it step by step. Let me break down the days month by month. March 20, 2020. March has 31 days, so from March 20 to March 31 is 11 days (since March 20 is the starting day, so from March 20 to March 31 inclusive would be 12 days, but since we count the days that have passed after March 20, it's 11 days in March). So, 11 days in March. Now let's see how many days are left in the 176. 176 - 11 = 165 days left. Next is April, which has 30 days. So adding April: 165 - 30 = 135 days left. Then May has 31 days. So 135 - 31 = 104 days left. June has 30 days. 104 - 30 = 74 days left. July has 31 days. 74 - 31 = 43 days left. August has 31 days. So 43 - 31 = 12 days left. So, after July 31, there are 12 days left. So adding 12 days to August 1 would take us to August 12, 2020. Wait, let's check: So, March 20 to March 31: 11 days April: 30 May: 31 June:
